overall.description: First-person perspective from a truck cabin in a driving simulator game, navigating through rainy European urban streets. The vehicle drives through residential and commercial areas, makes a right turn at an intersection, and stops at a traffic light while windshield wipers actively clear rain from the windshield.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows straight-line driving through a residential urban street during heavy rain. The truck cabin interior is visible with active windshield wipers clearing rain. Apartment buildings line both sides of the road with parked cars along the curbs, while sparse trees are visible on the left. The road surface is wet with visible reflections.

events.description: vehicle begins right turn maneuver at intersection, steering wheel turns right
completes turn and enters new street with different building architecture and traffic pattern

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the intersection, navigating around the corner and accelerating into the new street

segments.scene_description: The truck approaches and navigates a right turn at an urban intersection. The scene opens up at the intersection revealing crosswalk markings and traffic signs, then transitions to a new street lined with commercial buildings on the right. A blue delivery van is visible ahead as the truck completes the turn and continues down the new road.

events.description: approaching traffic light which is showing red, beginning to slow down

agents.ego_description: driving straight toward a traffic light, gradually slowing down as the red signal becomes visible ahead

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a commercial street with taller apartment buildings on the left and storefronts on the right. The vehicle approaches an intersection where a traffic light displays red, causing the truck to slow down. A yellow truck is visible stopped at the light ahead, and the road features clear lane markings and crosswalk lines.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with traffic light control and crosswalks

events.description: comes to complete stop at red traffic light behind other waiting vehicles
traffic light changes to green and vehicle begins accelerating through intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at the red light waiting for the signal to change, then accelerates forward when the light turns green

notable_agents.action: red sedan waiting ahead at the traffic light, moves forward when light turns green

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road surface at the intersection
lane divider lines and directional arrows painted on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The truck stops at a red traffic light at a wide urban intersection, waiting behind other vehicles. The scene is open with clear views of crosswalk markings and surrounding commercial buildings. After waiting, the traffic light changes to green and the truck accelerates forward through the intersection, following the flow of traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban avenue with modern residential and commercial buildings

agents.ego_description: accelerating to cruising speed on a multi-lane avenue, maintaining steady progress through the urban environment

notable_agents.action: blue car overtaking on the right side and moving ahead

entered.detail: contemporary multi-story residential complexes with modern facades on the right side
metal guardrail separating the road from the sidewalk on the right side
elevated road or pedestrian bridge visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The truck continues driving along a multi-lane urban avenue after clearing the intersection. Modern apartment buildings line the right side behind a metal guardrail, while the left side features trees and fencing. The road stretches ahead toward an overpass structure in the distance, with moderate traffic including a blue car overtaking on the right. Rain continues to fall with wipers maintaining visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates from a rainy residential street into a commercial urban district. It begins with straight-line driving through a neighborhood of apartment buildings and parked cars, where active windshield wipers clear heavy rain from the glass and the wet road reflects the gray surroundings. As the truck approaches an intersection, the view opens up to reveal crosswalk markings and traffic signs before the camera smoothly pivots through a right turn. The scene then shifts toward a new street lined with commercial buildings, following a blue delivery van that leads the way forward.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it navigates a rainy commercial district and transitions onto a wide urban avenue. It begins by driving along a street lined with apartment buildings and storefronts, slowing down as it approaches a red traffic light and a stopped yellow truck. As the light changes to green, the vehicle accelerates forward through the wide intersection, leaving the dense commercial storefronts behind. The scene then opens up into a multi-lane avenue where the environment shifts to modern apartments behind metal guardrails and roadside trees. Finally, the truck continues its steady progress toward a distant overpass while windshield wipers clear the persistent rain and a blue car overtakes on the right.
